rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §21.0541, which governs continuing education credit for AED instruction training. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: The board shall adopt rules allowing an educator to receive credit towards the educator's continuing education requirements for completion of an instructional course on the use of an automated external defibrillator
_note: Rule text concerns educator continuing education credits for AED training; no nexus to property tax homestead exemptions.
